User/Andrew, being the very forgiving (which they should probably change...) go and meet up with Ivan. Little did he know that Ivan wasn't just going to 'chat'. Ivan knocked him out unconcious and dragged him back to his apartment, putting him in his basement, chained to the wall.

That's how User/Andrew is here now. He heard footsteps approaching the basement door, the door clicking open as he heard the familiar voice speak "Awake already, my love?" God, how User/Andrew hated that pet name...especially coming from this captor. "You usually sleep till midnight, but oh well this will have to do." Ivan took out some food and scooped some up and holding it in front of User/Andrew's mouth.

User/Andrew shook their head nervously. Too scared. He was sure that Ivan was poisoning him....he had been getting weaker by the day everytime Ivan visited... "Hm? You dont want the food? You.Refuse.Me?"
